nodes.title: REQUIREMENTS
widgets_values:
## Workflow Prerequisites ##

This workflow requires the following custom nodes, which can be obtained via ComfyUI-Manager:

  * Z-Image Power Nodes: https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
  * ComfyUI-GGUF       : https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF

 Additionally, ensure you have the following 3 models downloaded and placed in their respective
 directories within your ComfyUI installation:

  z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/jayn7/Z-Image-Turbo-GGUF/blob/main/z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`

  Qwen3-4B-Q8_0.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-4B-GGUF/blob/main/Qwen3-4B-Q8_0.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`

  ae.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `Comfyui/models/vae/`

## More Info ##

- https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
- https://civitai.com/models/2322533/z-image-power-nodes

Created by Martin Rizzo
  GitHub : https://github.com/martin-rizzo
  CivitAI: https://civitai.com/user/Photographer
  Reddit : https://www.reddit.com/user/FotografoVirtual

A fair-skinned young woman is depicted in profile, looking directly at the camera. She has short, wavy blonde hair and wears a form-fitting silver dress with a deep V-neck and long sleeves that begin at her upper arms. A silver necklace with a key-shaped pendant adorns her neck. Her fingernails are painted a bright pink. In the dark, unlit background stands a tall, slender alien figure. This alien figure has pale skin and disturbingly large, dark, and piercing eyes that convey a menacing presence. Its overall shape is sharp and angular, enhancing its terrifying appearance. The setting suggests a laboratory or medical facility, with metal doors and equipment barely visible behind the figures. The lighting is predominantly dark with minimal illumination, casting deep shadows.

nodes.title: README
widgets_values: This workflow generates a side-by-side comparison showcase to demonstrate the impact of the 'turbo_creativity' toggle. By comparing two rows of images using the same seeds, it highlights the difference between having the feature disabled (top) versus enabled (bottom). I use this figure in the README so you can clearly see how 'turbo_creativity' influences the final output across different generations
